# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
        "before"
      element ns=html local="fieldset" attrs=[]
        "inside"
      element ns=html local="keygen" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="input" attrs=[]
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: before-html-implicit-html
  tree-builder: before-head-implicit-head
  tree-builder: after-head-implicit-body
  tree-builder: in-body-block-start-tag-closes-open-p
